name: hypo-workflow
description: Serialized prompt workflow with setup, planning, execution, cycles, patches, auditing, debugging, release automation, watchdog, and WebUI support.

interface.shortDescription: Plan-to-release workflow automation with setup, progress tracking, and dashboard support.
interface.longDescription: Hypo-Workflow packages a complete planning and execution workflow with native skills, smart stop hooks, dual plan modes, Cycle archives, persistent Patches, context-injected planning, progress summaries, serial subagent orchestration, plugin setup, Auto Resume watchdog, and a live dashboard for a local .pipeline workspace.
